item.description: Hello, I am Talayhan! I am a software engineer and currently living in Istanbul, Turkey. About this blog I blog about my hobby projects, books/papers I read, github repos I like, etc in English and Turkish - generally as a way to organize my ideas. Contact I’m on Twitter at @talayhans. And my email address is samet(dot)talayhan(at)gmail I love hearing from you. GPG Key: 0xEA38D604

item.title: Bookmarks
item.description: Name Link Notes Unix Programming every2 The UNIX Time-Sharing System PDF Electronic version recreated by Eric A. BrewerUniversity of California at Berkeley Linux VM Notes github Archived Data Structures and C++ CS225 Notes of data structures and C++ concepts, along with guides for the tools you’ll need in this course Bryce Wiedenbeck - swarthmore.edu Courses Asistang Prof.

item.title: Books
item.description: Currently Reading Cover Info Notes Otomatik Musteri Author: John Warrillow Blink Author: Malcolm Gladwell Hayir Diyebilme Sanati Author: Muthis Psikoloji Ornekleri cok uzun buldugum bos zamaniniz varsa ve tek alternatifiniz bu kitapsa okunabilir. Eger sonlarina dogru beni sasirtmazsa suan icin 5 uzerinden 2 veriyorum. Modern C Author: Jens Gustedt Want to Read Cover Info Notes The Art of Computer Programming - Amazon Link HPO.
